_meta.note: Draft scaffold. MUST receive Persian native-speaker clinical review before v1.0 launch. Clinical instrument scores use Latin digits; body copy uses Persian wording.

welcome.title: خوش آمدید
welcome.body: با یک وضعیت‌سنجی شروع کنید یا ابزاری را باز کنید.

urge.intensityLabel: شدت میل در همین لحظه چقدر است؟

cta.primary: همین حالا به کمک نیاز دارم

crisis.headline: شما تنها نیستید.
crisis.body: اگر در بحران هستید، لطفاً کمک بخواهید. شماره‌های زیر رایگان و محرمانه‌اند.
crisis.useCopingTool: ابتدا یک ابزار مقابله را امتحان کنید

hero.headline: همراه شما در فاصله‌ی میان جلسات درمان.
hero.sub: ابزارهای مقابله‌ی مبتنی بر شواهد، با طراحی محرمانه، هر زمان که نیاز داشتید.

pricing.title: قیمت‌گذاری ساده و منصفانه
pricing.freeSub: ابزارهای اصلی مقابله، مسیر بحران، نمای اولیه‌ی الگوها.
pricing.plusSub: شخصی‌سازی، روندهای گسترده، دفترچه‌ی صوتی، اشتراک با درمانگر.

privacy.headline: Privacy
privacy.body: Your data stays on your device unless you explicitly choose to share it. We do not sell data, run ads, or use behavioral fingerprinting.

safety.headline: Safety
safety.body: Discipline OS is not a crisis hotline replacement. If you are in immediate danger, use the crisis path or call your local emergency number.

journal.title: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Journal
journal.subtitle: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Your private space to reflect.
journal.emptyBody: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Your entries are private and only visible to you. Start writing to track your journey.

checkIn.title: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Check In
checkIn.pageSubtitle: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: How are you feeling right now?
checkIn.compassionBody: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Recording how you feel is the first step. Would you like to try a coping tool?
checkIn.copingPrompt: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Consider using a coping tool while you wait for the urge to pass.

tools.title: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Coping Tools
tools.subtitle: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Evidence-based techniques for managing urges.
tools.featuredDescription: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: A great first tool if you're new or unsure where to begin.

boxBreathing.name: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Box Breathing
boxBreathing.description: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: A simple breathing pattern that calms the nervous system in minutes.

grounding54321.name: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: 5-4-3-2-1 Grounding
grounding54321.description: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Anchor yourself to the present moment using your five senses.

pmr.name: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Progressive Muscle Relaxation
pmr.description: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Systematically release tension held in your body.

coldWater.name: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Cold Water Reset
coldWater.description: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Splashing cold water activates the dive reflex to slow your heart rate.

urgeSurfing.name: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Urge Surfing
urgeSurfing.description: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Observe the urge like a wave — it rises, peaks, and passes.

stopTechnique.name: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: STOP Technique
stopTechnique.description: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Stop, Take a breath, Observe, Proceed mindfully.

compassionMeditation.name: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Compassion Meditation
compassionMeditation.description: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Direct kindness toward yourself during a difficult moment.

delayDistract.name: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Delay & Distract
delayDistract.description: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Commit to waiting 10 minutes — urges nearly always pass.

assessments.title: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Assessments
assessments.subtitle: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Validated questionnaires to track your mental health over time.
assessments.disclaimer: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Scores are for self-monitoring only and not a diagnosis. Consult a healthcare professional.

auditC.name: AUDIT-C
auditC.fullName: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Alcohol Use Disorders Identification Test – Consumption

session.thankYou: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Thank you for completing this assessment.
session.safetyMessage: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: You mentioned thoughts of self-harm. You don't have to face this alone.
session.clinicalDisclaimer: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: This assessment is not a substitute for professional clinical evaluation.
session.submitError: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Something went wrong. Please try again.
session.answerRequired: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Please select an answer before continuing.

descriptions.phq-9: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Measures how often you have been bothered by depressive symptoms over the past two weeks.
descriptions.gad-7: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Measures how often you have been bothered by anxiety symptoms over the past two weeks.
descriptions.who-5: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Measures your general wellbeing over the past two weeks.
descriptions.audit-c: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: A brief screen for hazardous or harmful alcohol consumption.
descriptions.pss-10: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Measures the degree to which situations in your life are perceived as stressful over the past month.

account.title: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Account
account.emailReadOnly: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Email is managed by your sign-in provider

notifications.title: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Notifications
notifications.pushDescription: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Get notified when patterns are detected and during high-risk windows

privacy.title: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Privacy
privacy.downloadDescription: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Export your check-ins, journal, and assessment history as JSON
privacy.deleteDescription: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
privacy.deleteDialogBody: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: This will permanently delete your account, all check-ins, journal entries, assessment results, and usage history. This action cannot be undone.
privacy.deleteWarning: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted.
privacy.downloadErrorGeneric: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Something went wrong. Please try again.
privacy.deleteErrorGeneric: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
